headline: The Bull Case For Trimble (TRMB) Could Change Following Audit Chair Shift Amid Material Weakness Remediation
summary: On May 26, 2026, Trimble Inc. announced that director Mark S. Peek resigned from the Board and its committees, while Thomas Sweet was appointed Chair of the Audit Committee to oversee remediation of material weaknesses expected to be addressed in 2027. These leadership changes come as Trimble reports record recurring revenue, stronger gross margins, and continued execution of its Connect & Scale strategy in the latest quarter. With Thomas Sweet now leading the Audit Committee, we’ll examine...
